title: Treasury yields rise as U.S.-Iran peace talks hit an impasse
summary_full: U.S. Treasury yields rose on Tuesday as investors awaited developments on negotiations between the U.S. and Iran, which hit an impasse over the weekend.
summary_public: U.S. Treasury yields rose on Tuesday as investors awaited developments on negotiations between the U.S. and Iran, which hit an impasse over the weekend.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: U.S.-Iran peace talks hit an impasse
